title: draba polytricha
intro: Draba polytricha, also known as the manyseeded draba or false whitlow grass, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Draba polytricha include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Draba polytricha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and well-being.
